source_excerpt: "I shall go with Dorothy," declared the Lion, "for I am tired of your city and long for the woods and the country again. I am really a wild beast, you know. Besides, Dorothy will need someone to protect her."

source_excerpt: "That is true," agreed the Woodman. "My axe may be of service to her; so I also will go with her to the Land of the South."
